case_title: S AND C MOTORS INC VS SPELLMAN BRETT

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $603.32 FILED BY S AND C MOTORS INC AS TO DEFENDANT SPELLMAN BRETT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF S AND C MOTORS INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPELLMAN BRETT $603.32 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $649.32 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO SPELLMAN BRETT RETURNED, ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
